channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-15628] sanityn: test_33c: 'Sync-Lock-Cancel triggered'
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for paf <pfarrell@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/d3fa8050-0c62-4897-b2a1-98ec8d15d0cb

== sanityn test 33c: Cancel cross-MDT lock should trigger Sync-Lock-Cancel ========================================================== 03:41:54 (1646710914)
CMD: onyx-113vm9 grep -c /mnt/lustre-mds1' ' /proc/mounts || true
Stopping /mnt/lustre-mds1 (opts on onyx-113vm9
CMD: onyx-113vm9 umount -d /mnt/lustre-mds1
CMD: onyx-113vm9 lsmod | grep lnet > /dev/null &&
lctl dl | grep ' ST ' || true
CMD: onyx-113vm9 mkdir -p /mnt/lustre-mds1
CMD: onyx-113vm9 dmsetup status /dev/mapper/mds1_flakey >/dev/null 2>&1
CMD: onyx-113vm9 dmsetup status /dev/mapper/mds1_flakey 2>&1
CMD: onyx-113vm9 test -b /dev/mapper/mds1_flakey
CMD: onyx-113vm9 e2label /dev/mapper/mds1_flakey
Starting mds1: -o localrecov /dev/mapper/mds1_flakey /mnt/lustre-mds1
CMD: onyx-113vm9 mkdir -p /mnt/lustre-mds1; mount -t lustre -o localrecov /dev/mapper/mds1_flakey /mnt/lustre-mds1
CMD: onyx-113vm9 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n health_check
CMD: onyx-113vm9 PATH=/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/opt/iozone/bin:/opt/iozone/bin:/opt/iozone/bin:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/mpi:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/racer:/usr/lib64/lustre/../lustre-iokit/sgpdd-survey:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/utils/gss:/usr/lib64/lustre/utils:/usr/lib64/openmpi/bin:/usr/share/Modules/bin:/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin:/bin::/sbin:/bin:/usr/sbin: NAME=autotest_config bash rpc.sh set_default_debug \"vfstrace rpctrace dlmtrace neterror ha config ioctl super lfsck\" \"all\" 4
onyx-113vm9: CMD: onyx-113vm9 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n version 2>/dev/null
onyx-113vm9: CMD: onyx-113vm9 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n version 2>/dev/null
onyx-113vm9: CMD: onyx-113vm8 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n version 2>/dev/null
onyx-113vm9: CMD: onyx-113vm9.onyx.whamcloud.com /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n version 2>/dev/null
onyx-113vm9: onyx-113vm9.onyx.whamcloud.com: executing set_default_debug vfstrace rpctrace dlmtrace neterror ha config ioctl super lfsck all 4
CMD: onyx-113vm9 e2label /dev/mapper/mds1_flakey 2>/dev/null | grep -E ':[a-zA-Z]

{3}

[0-9]

{4}

'
pdsh@onyx-113vm6: onyx-113vm9: ssh exited with exit code 1
CMD: onyx-113vm9 e2label /dev/mapper/mds1_flakey 2>/dev/null
Started lustre-MDT0000
CMD: onyx-113vm10,onyx-113vm9 lctl set_param -n os[cd]*.MDT.force_sync=1
CMD: onyx-113vm8 lctl set_param -n osd*.OS.force_sync=1
CMD: onyx-113vm9 lctl set_param -n mdt.*.sync_count=0
CMD: onyx-113vm9 lctl get_param -n mdt.*MDT0000.sync_count
sync_count 2
CMD: onyx-113vm10,onyx-113vm9 lctl set_param -n os[cd]*.MDT.force_sync=1
CMD: onyx-113vm8 lctl set_param -n osd*.OS.force_sync=1
CMD: onyx-113vm9 lctl set_param -n mdt.*.sync_count=0
CMD: onyx-113vm9 lctl get_param -n mdt.*MDT0000.sync_count
sync_count 1
sanityn test_33c: @@@@@@ FAIL: Sync-Lock-Cancel triggered
Trace dump:
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6386:error()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/sanityn.sh:1112:test_33c()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6690:run_one()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6737:run_one_logged()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6578:run_test()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/sanityn.sh:1114:main()
Dumping lctl log to /autotest/autotest-1/2022-03-07/lustre-reviews_review-dne-part-5_86532_1_7_40d8f77d-a81d-49a0-ba4a-58cc0569359f//sanityn.test_33c.*.1646710949.log
CMD: onyx-113vm10,onyx-113vm6.onyx.whamcloud.com,onyx-113vm7,onyx-113vm8,onyx-113vm9 /usr/sbin/lctl dk > /autotest/autotest-1/2022-03-07/lustre-reviews_review-dne-part-5_86532_1_7_40d8f77d-a81d-49a0-ba4a-58cc0569359f//sanityn.test_33c.debug_log.\$(hostname -s).1646710949.log;
dmesg > /autotest/autotest-1/2022-03-07/lustre-reviews_review-dne-part-5_86532_1_7_40d8f77d-a81d-49a0-ba4a-58cc0569359f//sanityn.test_33c.dmesg.\$(hostname -s).1646710949.log

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
